case_title: PROTECTIVE COATING SYSTEMS INC. VS. DEL SMITH ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-02-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 65920924)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-20-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROTECTIVE COATING SYSTEMS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, DEL INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS DEL SMITH DESIGN BUILD DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-22-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-18-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-29-2020
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-22-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-02-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
